title: ArchetypeClassification
description: Result of classifying an Action Table against known workflow archetypes. Maps action patterns to reusable workflow templates.

action_table_ref.description: Reference to the Action Table artifact this classification applies to (UUID).

archetype_id.description: Identifier of the matched archetype (e.g., scheduled_reporting_pipeline, software_build).

classification_state.description: Current state of the classification: unknown (not attempted), candidate (partial match), classified (confirmed), custom (no match).

capability_coverage.description: Fraction of archetype required capabilities covered by the action table.

dependency_alignment.description: How well the action table dependency structure matches the archetype pattern.

matched_capabilities.description: Capability families from the archetype that were matched in the action table.

missing_capabilities.description: Required capabilities from the archetype not found in the action table.

reasoning.description: Human-readable explanation of the classification decision.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this classification was created.

algorithm.description: The cryptographic algorithm used for signing.

signer_role.description: The role of the entity that produced this signature.

signature.description: Optional cryptographic signature over this artifact.
